protocol.name: review-gate-check
protocol.description: Shared protocol invoked by each review workflow after updating its Review Gate row. Checks if ALL reviews have passed and transitions story to done if so.

critical.mandate: The Review Gate table must have EXACTLY 3 rows: Code Review, QA Tests, Security Review. No other rows are valid. If extra rows exist, remove them.

step.title: Read Review Gate
step.action: Read the story file's Review Gate table
If Review Gate section is missing: initialize it with EXACTLY 3 rows — Code Review (PENDING), QA Tests (PENDING), Security Review (PENDING). Do NOT add any other rows.
If Review Gate table has extra rows beyond the 3 valid ones: remove the invalid rows
Parse each row: Review name, Status (PENDING | PASSED | FAILED), Report link

step.title: Evaluate Gate
step.action: Count: total rows, PASSED rows, FAILED rows, PENDING rows
If any row is FAILED: log "Review gate not passed — {failed_reviews} failed. Developer must fix and re-submit for review." No status change.
If any row is PENDING: log "Review gate incomplete — waiting on: {pending_reviews}." No status change.
If ALL rows are PASSED: transition story to done.

step.title: Transition to Done
step.action: Set story status to 'done' in story file frontmatter
Log: "Review gate PASSED — all reviews complete. Story is done."
step.template-output: Update sprint-status.yaml with story status set to done.
